_meta.purpose: Structured §10.2 win-case FV inputs per VCI watchlist name — enables E2 (P25 confidence interval + removes the scalar-only manual-confirm gate) when v2 flips. Merged into watchlist_tickers.json vci_watchlist[].fv_inputs by sync_vci_watchlist / the VCI run.
_meta.confidence: ANALYST ESTIMATES for flip-prep / shadow analysis. Win-case (if the bottleneck thesis fully plays out). Reproduce the stored bottleneck FV where one exists (ABCL). REFINE per name during the next VCI run before relying on them for a live deploy.
_meta.fields: latent_tam_usd_bn x capture_share x steady_margin x exit_multiple / fully_diluted_shares x fx_to_local = bottleneck_fv_per_share

ABCL.note: RE-DERIVED 6-Jul on current fundamentals (up from the stale $14): positive ABCL635 Phase-1 interim (NK3R, once-monthly, no liver tox; Phase-2 topline Q3-2026 = the binary), Jazz T-cell-engager deal Jun-26 ($56M upfront + tiered royalties), ~$655M liquidity (~28% of mkt cap), ~90 partner programs + owned pipeline (ABCL575 Ph1 Q4-26, 688/386 FIH 2027). Win-case ~$20. asset_structure=platform (90+ shots -> p uses platform default 0.50). FWDVCI-eligible (point asym 2.62x). Under v2 the conservative P25 asym = 2.01x -- RIGHT AT the 2.0x floor (knife-edge): treat as manual-confirm / hold pending the Q3 Phase-2 readout, which if positive re-rates it clearly above. The FV is an estimate; refine at the VCI run.

ALAB.note: RETIRED 6-Jul (removed from asymmetric watchlist). GRADUATED — market cap ~$66B >> $50B VCI ceiling. Priced for enormous growth (asym 0.33). RETIRE from the asymmetric sleeve regardless of v2. ACS 65 < 75 also fails the quality floor.

CRDO.note: GRADUATION-WATCH 6-Jul. ~GRADUATING — market cap ~$46B, approaching the $50B ceiling; priced for growth (asym 0.17). ACS 63 < 75. Single dominant product (AEC/SerDes). Retire/monitor.

RXRX.note: AI drug-discovery platform; ACS 60 (floor-capped, deteriorating — NVIDIA equity exit Feb-26, Gibson off board Jun-26). Point asymmetry 1.95 ~ at the 2.0 floor; P25 well below. Speculative TAM/capture. Do not deploy until ACS recovers above floor.
